name: traceability_compliance
description: Generate deterministic provenance evidence bundles and ISO-style compliance reports from knowledge graph walks. Uses W3C PROV-DM semantics for domain-agnostic lineage across manufacturing, biotech, and supply chain.
self_test: python -c "from plugins.prometheus.traceability_compliance.wrapper import PLUGIN; import asyncio; r=asyncio.run(PLUGIN.invoke({'mode':'self_test'})); assert r.get('valid')"

mode.description: Operation mode: 'trace' extracts provenance bundle, 'report' generates ISO narrative, 'self_test' runs built-in demo.

root_node_id.description: Starting node ID for the graph walk (e.g. 'board-8842').

graph_data.description: Serialized graph: {nodes: [{id, type, metadata}], edges: [{source, target, relation, metadata}]}.

output_format.description: Serialization format for the provenance document.
